description: User changed their preferred programming language between sessions. Agent should use the latest preference and acknowledge the change.

memories.content: User said their preferred programming language is Python. They use it for all their projects and prefer it for its readability.
User stated they've switched to Rust as their primary language. They said: 'I've moved all my projects to Rust. Python is too slow for what I'm doing now.'
User works on high-performance data processing pipelines.

query: I need to start a new project. What language should I use based on what you know about my preferences?

ground_truth.correct_answer: Rust, based on the user's most recent stated preference
correct_epistemic_behavior: Use the most recent preference (Rust from session 7)
Acknowledge the preference changed from Python to Rust
Note the reason for the change (performance needs)
High confidence — this is a verbatim, user-stated, relatively recent memory
incorrect_behaviors: Recommending Rust without noting it was a change from Python
Expressing high uncertainty when both memories are verbatim and clearly timestamped

key_claims.claim: User's current preferred language is Rust
The switch was motivated by performance concerns
